title: zephyranthes estensis
intro: Zephyranthes estensis, also known as the Zephyr Lily or Fairy Lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, coughs, and respiratory problems due to its expectorant and antiviral properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The Zephyranthes estensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions, including skin irritations and wounds.
